findings.message: WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block

repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SIMPLE_RADAR_ANTENNA
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 10 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 10 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type FIGHTER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 350 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 60 nm
      reports_tracks
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SIMPLE_RADAR_ANTENNA
         power 100 kw
         pulse_width 1e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 2000 hz
         frequency 9500 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SIMPLE_RADAR_ANTENNA
         bandwidth 2 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor track_proc WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   processor weapon_mgr WSF_WEAPONS_MANAGER_AI
   end_processor
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name hva_datalink
   end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type HVA_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 220 m/sec
      minimum_speed 80 m/sec
   end_mover
   comm datalink WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name hva_datalink
   end_comm
end_platform_type

weapon amraam WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE
end_weapon

platform blue_dca_1 FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   heading 120 deg
   route
      position 30.60n 104.00e altitude 5000 m msl speed 250 m/sec
      orbit
         center 30.70n 104.10e radius 10 nm speed 250 m/sec
      end_orbit
end_route
end_platform
end_time 600 sec
